subject: Chibi-style figure with very long silver hair in a dark coat — Setzer Gabbiani from Final Fantasy VI
description: A chibi-proportioned figure stands with long, flowing silver-white hair dominating the silhouette. They wear a dark coat or jacket with gold-yellow trim detailing and a distinctive collar. The pose is angled away, showing the figure's back and left side, with a slight profile view of the face. The background is a pale blue-white, clean and minimal. The EX badge in the upper right corner marks this as an EX-version card art using the stylized chibi treatment. The overall impression is of a roguish, confident character at rest.
foreground: Chibi figure with long flowing silver hair in dark gold-trimmed coat
emotion: composed, self-possessed — back-turned pose radiates cool detachment
